---
title: "Overview of one session"
subtitle: "Before looking at results by region or track, let's start with the whole. What becomes of the sixty-four thousand candidates?"
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
source("R/common.R")
source("R/i18n.R")
source("R/figures.R")
lang <- "en"
g <- panorama_data()
```

::: {.callout-note}
This page is being translated; the narrative text is not final.
:::

## The four outcomes of a candidacy

*Text to be translated.*

```{r decisions-barres}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 3.4
#| fig-alt: "Breakdown of candidates by final decision."
fig_pano_decisions(g, lang)
```

## The steps, one by one

*Text to be translated.*

```{r entonnoir}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 3.8
#| fig-alt: "Funnel of candidates: registered, present, above 8, admitted."
fig_pano_entonnoir(g, lang)
```

## The shape of the grades

*Text to be translated.*

```{r densite}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4.6
#| fig-alt: "Density of present candidates' averages with thresholds."
fig_pano_densite(g, lang)
```

## Honours

*Text to be translated.*

```{r mentions}
#| fig-width: 7.5
#| fig-height: 3.2
#| fig-alt: "Distribution of honours among admitted candidates."
fig_pano_mentions(g, lang)
```
